Position of the navigation menu in the top bar.

## Signature

```typescript
navbarDropdownPosition: 'left' | 'right';
```

## Default Value

'left'

## Remarks

Determines whether the API documentation menu appears on the left or right side of the Docusaurus navigation bar.
